result:
`passes: true`、`loop_active: false`、`halt_reason` 空を確認。ミッション完了です。

✅ ミッション達成 (Iteration: 1 / Score: 5.0)

【ミッション】`quarterly-summary.md` の7クレームを `weekly-metrics.md` の生テーブルと突合し、算術を明示して正誤判定・修正値提示・正解の明示確認まで行う mission 成果物を作成。

【主な成果物】`benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-07-claude-goal-vs-mission-tail-v1/tail-metrics-reconciliation-mission.md`（required heading 8種すべて含む）

【判定結果】
- 誤り: Claim 1（合計4,127→正しくは4,217）、Claim 3（3倍改善・毎週改善は両方誤り→実際は≈1.88倍/46.8%改善、Week8→9で+30msの悪化あり）、Claim 4（42%減→正しくは29.0%減）、Claim 5（平均約$1,300→正しくは$1,450）
- 正解: Claim 2（15%増）、Claim 6（稼働率99.95%）、Claim 7（Week7スパイクとキャンペーンの関連）— いずれも根拠算術付きで明示確認
- 棄却した疑似候補: 4件（Claim4の「quarter over quarter」解釈、Claim7の「coincides with」vs「explained by」、Claim2の丸い15%、Claim6の逐語一致）— いずれも理由付きで却下

【スコア内訳】mission-reviewer役の独立サブエージェント3体(A/B/verify)を実際に起動し、3者ともゼロ不一致・ゼロ指摘。`aggregate-reviews` の同点検知ヒューリスティックが Perspective A のスコアを「全体印象的な同点根拠」として自動除外（rubric R2の意図通りの挙動、成果物に開示済み）。B+verifyでcomposite 5.0、agreement delta 0.0、open_high 0。

【Specialists】selected: sc-document-reviewer / used: なし（実レビューは general-purpose Agent + mission-reviewer役プロンプトで代替）/ degraded: sc-document-reviewer, dev-performance-reviewer（両方 skipped, 理由記録済み）/ unselected-manual: なし

【次のステップ提案】
- mission-planner Skill 呼び出しが本サンドボックスで空応答だった事象（本成果物の Assumptions に記録済み）は、ベンチマークとは別に mission リポジトリ側で再現性を確認する価値あり
- 今回は `benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/` 配下のスコープ外ファイルには一切アクセスしていません

tool_input.args: Mission: Fact-check every numbered claim (7 claims) in benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/fixtures/tail/metrics-reconciliation/quarterly-summary.md against the raw table in benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/fixtures/tail/metrics-reconciliation/weekly-metrics.md. Recompute each figure, mark correct/incorrect, give corrected values with arithmetic shown, and write the final artifact to benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/run-output/2026-07-07-claude-goal-vs-mission-tail-v1/tail-metrics-reconciliation-mission.md with headings: Mission, Plan, Execution, Review, Score, Stop Decision, Evidence, Assumptions. Complexity: Complex. Constraints: no network/commit/push, only touch the output artifact file and .mission-state/, do not read anything else under benchmarks/mission-vs-goal/ besides the two named fixtures and the output file itself. Validator requires: all seven claims verified with recomputed arithmetic, corrected value stated for every incorrect claim, correct claims explicitly confirmed in a verified-claims section, and explicit separation of confirmed findings vs rejected candidates with rationale.

{
  "schema": "mission-review/1",
  "perspective": "A",
  "iteration": 1,
  "scores": {
    "mission_achievement": 5,
    "accuracy": 5,
    "completeness": 5,
    "usability": 5
  },
  "findings": [],
  "same_score_note": "All four axes converge at 5 because this task is a fully deterministic arithmetic fact-check with 13 rows of fixed data. Mission achievement measures coverage (7/7 claims verdicted, correct claims explicitly confirmed); accuracy measures whether every verdict and corrected value is arithmetically correct (independent re-derivation found 0 disagreements); completeness measures whether every required component exists; usability measures whether the artifact is immediately actionable. Scoring was not based on overall impression.",
  "notes": "Independent recomputation from the 13-row weekly-metrics.md table confirms all 7 verdicts and all corrected values in the draft artifact: signups total 4,217 (not 4,127); active-user growth exactly 15%; p95 improvement ~1.88x with a Week-8->9 regression of +30ms; support-ticket decrease 29.0% (not 42%); infra cost average $1,450/week exactly (not ~$1,300); uptime 99.95% from source notes; Week-7 as simultaneous peak for signups (410) and infra cost (1,620). Zero arithmetic errors found."
}

  "schema": "mission-review/1",

  "iteration": 1,
  "scores": {
    "mission_achievement": 5,
    "accuracy": 5,

Mission achievement = quantitative coverage of the 7 validator requirements; accuracy = zero arithmetic errors found on independent recomputation; completeness = structural coverage of headings, quotes, rejected-candidates, verified-claims section; usability = three-layer navigation (per-claim -> summary tables -> Stop Decision) enabling immediate use. Not a single overall-impression score.",
  "findings_detail_note": "Considered whether the Verified Claims table being a subsection under Evidence (rather than its own top-level heading) is a gap; concluded it satisfies the validator's requirement for 'a verified-claims section' and does not warrant a finding.",
  "notes": "All 7 claims have verdict + arithmetic + corrected value/confirmation; all 8 required headings present; fixture quotes verbatim; rejected-candidates section with rationale for 4 items. Independent arithmetic re-check found zero disagreements. Considered whether the Verified Claims table location (subsection of Evidence rather than a separate top-level heading) was a gap, and concluded it satisfies the validator requirement with no finding needed."
}

No arithmetic error detected anywhere.",
  "notes": "Full agreement on all 7 claims using computation methods deliberately different from the likely original method: (1) Signups: odd-week sum 2347 + even-week sum 1870 = 4217, confirming corrected value. (2) Active-user growth: 1230/8200 simplifies to 3/20 = 15.0% exactly. (3) p95 ratio 620/330 ~ 1.879, reduction ~46.8%; sole regression W8->W9 (+30ms); all 11 other transitions are decreases. (4) Support tickets: 61/210 ~ 29.0%, not 42%. (5) Infra cost: four-chunk grouping 5650+6040+4300+2860=18850; /13=1450 exact. (6) Uptime 99.95% verbatim match. (7) Week 7 unambiguous peak for both Signups (410) and Infra cost (1620). No other week shows a p95 latency increase."
